titleStmt.title: SII 31.53: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 53. (A.R. No. B 322 of 1938.) MALYĀLA, NANDIKOTKUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar in the behind the temple of Śiva in the village.

This inscription is dated in the cyclic year Khara, Vaiśākha śu. 15 Thursday. Both on paleographical and internal evidences, this can be assigned to 12th-13th century A.D. [the given date may corresponds to Śaka 1213=1291 A.D., April 5 Sunday 21.]

Records that Sarvvēśvarayyamgāru constructed the temples of Sarvēśvara named after himself and also it records the constructions of a temple and a maṇṭapa and installed a linga called Bollēśvara named after by Cheṟaku Bollayareḍḍi, the son Cheṟaku Peḍadēvaraya. It also refers to the gift to the maṭham for maintaining the worship and offerings to the same god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
khara saṁvatsara vaiśā
kha śu 15 gu . taṣupēra
nu sarvvēśvaramani liṁga
pratiṣṭhasēsi śivālyame
ttiṁci ceṟakupedadē
vaya koḍku bollayareḍḍi pē
raṁ bollēśvaramani liṁga
pratiṣṭhasēsi śivālyamu
Ettiṁci maṁṭapamu Ettiṁ
ci Ā dēpaḍlaku Aṁgaraṁga
bhōgāluṁ maṭhamuna dha
rmmamuṁ naḍapanu O
ḍayanigā Ānaticciri .
yāvaścaṁdraścasūryaśca
yāvatiṣṭhati mēdinī
tāvatsiva kadhālōkē ta
kṣētraṁ pratipātyatē .

svadattāṁ pa
radattāṁ vā
yōharēti
vasuṁdharā ṣa
ṣṭhirvvarṣa saha
srāṇi viṣṭā
yāṁ jāya
tēkrimiḥ . svadattā
dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ
paradattānu pāla
naṁ paradattāpa
hārēṇa svadattāṁ
niḥ phalaṁ bhavēt
Anyēṣāṁ cchadita
ṁ bhujtēsi sva
dghitaṁnaku . ta
smāt kaṣṭhatarōnī
svadattāsyōṁ
pahārakaṁ . sā
mānyōyaṁ dharmma
sētunṛpāṇāṁ kā
lēkālē pālanīyō
bhūyō bhūyōca
tē rāmacaṁdraḥ . śu
cirbhūmiṁgatatō
yaṁ śucirnnārī
pativratā śucirddha
rmmaṁ parōrāja bra
hmacārissadāśśuciḥ .
Digital edition of SII 31.53 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
